The synthetic Scholar SERP fixture below contains 20 representative results covering peer-reviewed articles, PDFs, books and citations. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. A Smith, B Johnson, C Lee - Nature Physics, 2023 - nature.com
A comprehensive introduction to quantum computing fundamentals including superposition, entanglement, and Shor's algorithm. We cover both theoretical foundations and ...

J Schmidt, K Albrecht, L Romero - Physical Review Letters, 2021 - APS
We demonstrate trapped ion quantum computing with 200 qubits, achieving gate fidelities exceeding 99.7%. The architecture scales linearly with ion count ...
